Price Hike Delhivery Opening : Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? Concern: Seller asked about Price hike- Why Price for Delhivery courier is high Information:- English - Sir/Ma'am, This is the sudden development at the courier's end bearing in mind the current trend in fuel prices and other systemic factors in the logistics market, this is not a one of change and this price hike is being done by the courier across its client base. Hindi - Sir/ Mam, Fuel price mein increase ke kaaran logistic market mein changes hue hain aur isi kaaran Courier partner ne shipping prices change kiye hain aur yeh poore customer base par lagu hai. System Activity- Need to tag all such cases so that we know the quantum at EOD. we need to capture VOC of all such cases received at CC Need to create Open ticket with clear subject Line - Price Hike Delihivery and need to select Issue category- Others, S ub-Category- Others , Group- Client Support, Agent- Abhishek Gaur Tickets notes should be the words of seller- for Example- "If seller is saying he is getting cheaper rates directly with delhivery", we have to update the same in Ticket Notes. Tracker form to be filled- https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19nfOeqOocuwWBqVvFVoIGnGNO0WONmqS3ZM7eXHb_Qg/edit?usp=sharing Points to be taken care- Freight charges have been increased for xpressbees, Ecom express and delhivery. Advisors can suggest seller to use bluedart or other courier partners. Advisors will inform the seller that we have introduced two new courier partners and will suggest to ship their orders through those courier partners. Advisors has to respond confidently and should not sound low or fumble on call. Advisors will not suggest the seller to upgrade their plans. Advisors will not say that he will raise a complaint instead they will say that we have captured your feedback. FAQs- FAQ on Price hike for Customer support 1. Why has the prices of the courier increased? Sir/Ma’am, as you are aware the fuel prices have increased and this has given an impact on the operational cost of transportation and aviation industries, this is why courier partners have increased the freight charges for all the customer bases. 2. If Seller wants to know the affected courier partners Due to rise in fuel prices the courier partners like-Ecom xp, express bees and Delhivery have increased their freight charges 3. If seller complaints that the charges are too high and looking forward for other alternates with SR apart from these 3 couriers (Ecom ,Xp b and Delhivery) Sir/Ma’am, we do have 17+ different courier options available for you with us to do the shipments You can do the shipments via courier partners like. * Ekart * DTDC * Kerry logistics * Bluedart à Agent will educate - Blue Dart you can activate from your panel by uploading the same PAN CARD which you have submitted at the time of account KYC, after PAN card upload the Blue Dart will be activated in 24-48hrs. * Amazon Shipping (SWA) --- > Agent needs to check first if amazon channel is activated, if yes do not pitch Amazon ,Ekart and Ecom courier and can pitch - Blue Dart in case seller asks for other than agent will share other options – BD is recommended for Amazon And we are glad to inform you that we have introduced 2 more new courier partners in our platform Smart R and Load share You can easily check the freight charges from rate calculator via panel 4. How to check the new rates & serviceability of couriers? You can use the rate calculator to verify the new rates and courier serviceability using from Rate Calculator URL : https://www.shiprocket.in/shipping-rate-calculator/ 5.What will be the estimated charges for the other couriers The charges depend upon the source and destination pin code and the weight of the shipments, you can refer to Rate calculator from the panel 6. How many pin codes do we services Service? Sir/Ma’am, Overall, we are providing our services on 29000 pin code Further Assistance:- Is there service related anything else I can help you with ? Closing:- Thank you for calling shiprocket, have a great day ahead. SHIPCOIN Q1. FAQ 1 :-Where can I check my Shipcoins? out can check the balance at the top right icon on the myShiprocket app. Click on the coins to get more details FAQ2.How can I earn Shipcoins? For every order which is fulfilled by Shiprocket, buyer will receive – 1% of the order value OR 250 shipcoins (whichever is minimum) FAQ 3 : - What is the validity of Shipcoins? Shipcoins are valid for 12 months from the date it is credited in the wallet. For example, shipcoins earned on 1st August, 2023 will expire on 31st July, 2024. Buyer can check the shipcoins balance via myShiprocket app FAQ4.How can I use Shipcoins? Buyer can use Shipcoins in availing attractive gifts and rewards from all the leading brands FAQ 5.When will Shipcoins be credited to my account? Buyer will receive Shipcoins on each order delivery and can use those Shipcoins to buy other services online via partner payment gateway' FAQ 6.Can I transfer Shipcoins to my friends or families? No. Shipcoins are not transferable to any other member. FAQ 7. How can Buyer utilize these coins? Ans – Buyer can use these coins while ordering from attached brands only. (PFA - list of 3376 brands) Steps are :- - Buyer needs to choose pay with reward option while processing for payment option Enter OTP sent to the device & submit. Points will be added to the order and discount will be applied to the order. FAQ 8. Will Seller have any knowledge or visibility of shipcoins ? Ans- No this is only for Buyers.

SR Promise Shiprocket Promise is a purchase protection program designed to enhance customer trust and boost website conversions. Purpose : It aims to build customer trust at various touchpoints during the shopping experience. Availability : Currently, Shiprocket Promise is available as a self-serve app specifically for Shopify stores. Sellers on other platforms can reach out to Shiprocket at srpromise@shiprocket.com for customization options. Adding the Promise Widget : To enable the Promise widget on your Shopify store, follow these steps: Visit the Shopify app store and install the Shiprocket Promise app. Complete the onboarding process, which includes updating store details, adding business information, specifying your return policy, selecting trust badges, and customizing the widget's appearance. Save the widget and approve billing through the Shopify billing API. Customization : Sellers can customize the Promise widget and trust badges to match their store's theme, including changes to text color, font-family, and font-weight. Performance Dashboard : Once the Promise widgets are enabled, sellers can access a dashboard to monitor their store's performance, including metrics like EDD compliance, Promise orders, and ATC percentage. Eligibility : You must have an active website. You need to display the Shiprocket Promise badge on your homepage, product detail page, and checkout page. All tracking communication should be sent through the myShiprocket app. Non-Seller Use : Non-Shiprocket sellers can also use Shiprocket Promise by completing a quick onboarding process.

Content: Back Updated Version of Post Ship:- Brand Boost Launch Date - 25th Jan 23 Opening : Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to Shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? System Check :- 1) Copy link from SPARK & paste it in new tab / Click on Internal ICRM (Ask for AWB no. in shadow fax cases) Inform seller about the following :- Sir/Ma'am would like to inform you that s hiprocket has launch ed a new feature named as Brand Boost wherein we are offering a branded tracking experience to all the SR Sellers . This feature will help you in increase the brand awareness among buyers via shipricket platform. I would also like to inform you that the charges will be Rs. 2.99 + GST per Shipment .( GST exclusive i.e. 18% ) New Features available in brand boost :- Sir/ Ma'am you can use your Brand Logo under this feature We have provided Menu links option wherein you can display your brand details and contact details for easy access to buyers. Social media links option is also available in new feature wherein you have add the social platforms page links to promote the product/ brand. Instagram feed - Since Instagram is most trending platform to promote the product globally so SR has provided this option wherein the brand shoot pics and pages can be displayed with this new feature. Youtube - This new feature allows you to upload and display the product/brand videos available on youtube. Promotional banners - This new feature allows you to add the product banners / discount banners on the tracking page which will help in promotion. Custom URL - You may add the product URL for easy access. Product recommendations - If you wants to promote the most selling products then this new feature allows the sellers to recommend the products and similar products falls in category. Multiple themes - You will get an option to select multiple themes to present best appearance. I mproved tracking page helps you :- It will help in Reduc ing “ where is my order ” queries by 65% It will help in Reduc ing the support cost by 45% It will help in Increas ing the repeat purchases by 15% It will help in getting Better NPS by 2X (More Customer S atis fac tion) Note :- From June 2023, the brand boost billing logic has been changed from all delivered shipments to all delivered+ RTO delivered shipments. The brand boost charge for any AWB will get deducted from the wallet as soon as the shipment is marked as pickup scheduled, and billing/invoicing will happen for all the shipments that will reach to their terminal status including delivered, RTO delivered. There are cases wherein Brand Boost invoices have been generated and the seller is raising an escalation that they have not activated such services - Assign such cases or tickets to the Tech. Sir/Ma'am, You will get the Invoice like the normal invoice( Brand Boost is a value added service so a VAS invoice will be generated, which will be shared on a monthly basis. ). This facility is not available in SR app How Seller will able to check Analytics dashboard? Under discussion Will seller get an option to select which photo will be visible if he/she sync Instagram or the latest post will be visible ? No, you won't get the option to select this, it will sync automatically Further assistance :- Is there service related anything else I can help you with ? Closing :- Thank you for calling Shiprocket. Content: Post Ship is now Brand Boost - Updated Version Note - The updated Version of Post ship is Brand Boost which is a Paid service and is updated in SOP with "Brand Boost - Updated Version of Post Ship" Scenario :- Seller called to know the process to customize and create the tracking page for his shipment. Opening:- Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to Shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? Assurance:- I will surely help you regarding your concern. Information:- Post Ship provides buyers a seamless post purchase experience with customized tracking page, marketing banners and regular SMS, Email notification. Benefits- • Tracking page with complete information • Real time order tracking • Estimated date of delivery • Regular SMS and Email updates • White labelled tracking pages • Promote other products • Links to external pages • Learn about buyer’s experience Path-Seller panel->Setting->Tracking Page You need to follow the below mentioned steps to create a branding and tracking page. 1.Setting- i n this tab you will add your website URL along with website’s domain and sub domain followed by saving this information. 2.Tracking widgets- I n this tab you will get an option to align the tab as per their preferences. For example, “banners”, “menu links”,etc. 3.Marketing banners- You can add up to 3 marketing banners along with a URL to make the tracking page more attractive. 4.Menu links- You can add unlimited menu links using this option, that will help you to categorize the product line. For example a menu link can be “MEN clothing”, “WOMEN clothing", Kids-Boy or a girl clothing etc. 5.NPS- Also known as “NET PROMOTERS SCORE”. You can opt for NPS service, which will allow the buyers to rate services. 6.Returns- Enabling the “RETURNS” option, You will empower your buyer to place a return order using the same tracking page. Further Assistance:- Is there anything else, I can assist regarding shiprocket. Closing :- Thank you for calling in shiprocket have a nice day. SOP Name: New Process For Domestic Shipment Pickup  Order Cancellation Calls
Content: New Process For Domestic Shipment Pickup / Order Cancellation Calls 1. Call Transfer (10:00 AM – 6:45 PM) If a BPOC/COG agent receives any call related to Domestic Shipment Pickup or Order Cancellation , the call must be transferred to the queue: 👉 “Domestic Pickup – Transfer IH CC” This queue is live and must be used only during 10:00 AM to 6:45 PM . No exceptions are allowed during this time window. 2. Skill Alignment (Outside Core Hours) From 8:00 AM to 10:00 AM and 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM : Advisors must be aligned on the skill and need to handle cases on their own, no transfer to que. 👉 “pick , Hindi Pickup” Do NOT use the “pick , Hindi Pickup” skill between 10:00 AM and 7:00 PM . 3. Skill Restriction The skill “ Domestic Pickup – Transfer IH CC” must NOT be assigned to any BPOC/COG advisor under any circumstances. Script to transfer the call “I’m transferring your call to our concerned team for further assistance related to Pickup/order cancellation. Please stay on the call.” Click on transfer: Select the Queue : “Domestic Pickup – Transfer IH CC” Select Blind and then transfer to the queue.

Shiprocket Audience Pro 1) USPs - How is it going to help my seller? AI-Tailored Audience Segments : Helps sellers optimize Facebook ad campaigns with data-driven audience targeting. Better ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) : The AI-created segments ensure better matching with potential buyers, improving conversions. Pre-Segmented Audiences : Sellers can choose from multiple categories like high-spending buyers, prepaid buyers, fashion enthusiasts, and more. RTO Risk Reduction : Includes an exclusion audience (High Risk RTO Buyers) to help avoid cash-on-delivery (COD) fraud and reduce return rates. Affordable Pricing : Starter Plan starts at ₹1,499 and Growth Plan ranges from ₹2,399 to ₹2,799, making it cost-effective for small and large campaigns. Seamless Integration : Direct integration with Facebook Ad Manager for easy activation and tracking. Discounts for Bulk Purchases : Sellers get additional discounts when purchasing multiple audience segments. 2) Activation Process / SPOC and TAT Steps to Activate: Login to AudiencePro via Shiprocket App Store . Connect Facebook Account with the AudiencePro platform. Choose Audience Segment as per marketing goals. Make Payment via Payment page in Audience marketplace Audience is Shared Automatically to the seller's Facebook Ad Manager. Verify Audience in Facebook Ads Manager under ‘All Audiences’. Single Point of Contact (SPOC): Under VAS tag cases to "Suraj" as FCR and give tickets to me and @Abhishek Gaur Turnaround Time (TAT): Activation is instant after payment. If there are verification issues, sellers may need to check their Meta account settings. 3) Service Charges Free Access : 4 Audiences are Free from starter plan. Starter Plan : ₹1,499 (Up to 4 lakh entries). Growth Plan : ₹2,399 - ₹2,799 (Between 7 to 22 lakh entries depending on the segment). Bulk Discounts : Buy 2 segments → 10% off Buy 3 segments → 15% off Buy 4 segments → 20% off 4) Deactivation Process / SPOC and TAT Manual Removal : Sellers can remove their Facebook account from the AudiencePro platform. SPOC for Deactivation : Self TAT : Deactivation is immediate upon removal of the Facebook account. 5) Target Audience / Tier Target Audience : E-commerce sellers looking to improve Facebook ad targeting. Brands selling online via D2C (Direct-to-Consumer) or marketplace models. Advertisers focused on conversions & reducing RTO . Audience Segments (Tiers) : High Spending Buyers → Luxury, electronics, fashion. Active & Frequent Buyers → Home decor, beauty, personal care. Prepaid Buyers → Apparel, footwear. Low Risk COD Buyers → Books, small home goods. High Risk RTO Buyers (Exclusion Audience) → To improve ad efficiency. Geographic Tiering : Works across Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 cities , based on seller preferences.

System Check :- 1) Copy link from SPARK & paste it in new tab / Click on Internal ICRM > Click on shipment details > Paste >SR tracking 2) Check the status of Shipment & accordingly proceed for information Inform seller about following :- You can cancel your order or shipment from the Shiprocket panel it's in any of the below statuses: - AWB Assignment - Pickup Scheduled - Pickup Error - Pickup Exception - Label Generated - Pick up Generated - Pickup Rescheduled Path :- Login on seller panel > Place cursor on order tab > Click on process orders > Click on tab where the order is ( Processing, Ready to ship & Manifest) Click on order ID > Click on Cancel You will get following Pop-up in next page Processing - Cancel Order Ready to Ship - Cancel order & Cancel Shipment Manifest - Cancel order & Cancel Shipment Note :- In out for pickup you will not get cancel option to cancel order. Order Cancellation: If you cancel an order, the same will be cancelled with in 3-4 days & your amount will be refunded to your Shiprocket wallet automatically . Shipment Cancellation: If you cancel a shipment, the refund will be processed within 24 working hours with shipping cancellation. If seller wanted to cancel the shipment from contact center center end :- We have enabled the pickup cancel option in ICRM, below is the process which will only work on SSO logins. Only proceed if the seller cannot cancel or refuses reassignment. Check if shipment status is one of: AWB Assignment, Pickup Scheduled, Pickup Error, Pickup Exception, Label Generated, Pickup Generated, Pickup Rescheduled. On clicking the "Cancel Pickup" button in ICRM under the Shipment TAB, the advisor must select the cancellation reason from the dropdown. Inform the seller that cancellation and refund will be processed within 2-3 hours, and refund appears in Shiprocket wallet. If cancellation requested status persists >3 days with no refund, click the "Freight Refund" button in ICRM. Inform seller refund will be reflected in 2-3 hours. 2. Order Cancellation action plan to reduce error: 1. If status is cancellation requested and if the seller confirmed that the cancellation date is less than 3 days then inform the seller to wait for 3-4 days from the cancellation requested date. If seller is unable to share the date then assign to pickup group and mention in private note that "Seller is unable to share the cancellation requested date hence assigning to pickup group. If the seller confirms that cancellation is greater than 4 days then mention the same in a private note and assign to the pickup group/channel. Back RTO Escalation in Shiprocket Opening : Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to Shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? We are introducing a new Escalation feature in the seller panel, which will allow you to escalate delays in the RTO delivery, you can directly escalate it from Shiprocket account by login your seller panel. Ques 1: When is a seller allowed to escalate an RTO Delay? Answer: We calculate the RTO Estimated Delivery Date (RTO EDD) based on the SLAs of each zone. If a shipment is in either RTO Initiated or RTO In Transit statuses and its RTO EDD is breached, we display an Escalate button to the seller. RTO EDD criteria: a) The following RTO TATs do not include the RTO Initiated date and we are keeping RTO SLAs static. We are also excluding Sundays in the RTO EDD calculation (Snap pasted above) b) Zone Description:- Zone A- Within City Zone B- Within State Zone C - Metro to Metro Zone D- Rest of India, except North east and J&K Zone E - North east and J&K Ques 2: Where can the seller raise RTO Escalation? Answer: RTO Escalation can be raised either from the RTO tab or the All tab of the Orders screen. Path for RTO Escalation: a) The seller should log in to their account b) Click on the Orders option from the left-hand menu, and then select the RTO tab c) If the RTO EDD has passed, the Escalate button will be displayed on the right-hand side d) The seller can add their comments and easily escalate the delay e) After being escalated, the escalation history is displayed along with the option for multiple communications. Note: Shiprocket will send an email confirmation to the seller after they have raised the escalation. Ques 3: As an Operations person, how can I view this escalation and what actions can I take on it? Answer: An internal flow for ICRM >> Delivery >> RTO Delay Escalation has been added, where you can view the details of each escalation that has been raised. You can act on the escalated issue by changing its status to either "In Progress" or "Closed" and by adding appropriate comments. Ensure that the comments added by you are specific and well-written, as they will be displayed on the seller panel and sent through email. During the "In Progress" stage, you can send multiple communications to the seller. Note: Email notifications will also be sent to sellers for escalation statuses of "In Progress" and "Closed". Bulk Upload: You can update the status of multiple escalations simultaneously by using the Bulk Status Upload feature. The comments added in the CSV file will also be displayed in the seller panel and email communication. Ques 4: Which statuses result in the closure of RTO Delay Escalation? Answer: On the following statuses, RTO delay escalation would automatically close: RTO NDR, RTO delivered, Disposed of, Destroyed, Lost, RTO Acknowledged, Put away Done. We can also manually close the escalation from ICRM. Ques 5: Are we allowing Re-escalations? Answer: Sellers may escalate again within 48 hours from the date of Escalation closure. Ques 6: What is the RTO delay escalation resolution time? Answer: 72 hours from the raised date. Ques 7: Will this be available on the Support Panel and Decision Tree? Answer: We are currently working on this and will provide you with an update as soon as it becomes available on both the Support panel and Decision Tree. Ques 8: Please share the email communications that we are sending to sellers Answers: Email communication screenshots are attached to this email. System Check :- 1) Copy link from SPARK & paste it in new tab / Click on Internal ICRM . 2) Click on View details > Click on Shipment section Inform ation- RTO NDR- If your RTO shipment does not get delivered to you due to any reason, the shipment status will change to RTO NDR and you will have to take action on the NDR in order request another delivery attempt. Path (Seller Panel):- Path = Order > Orders > Rto > Select the filter of RTO NDR > Go to the action option > Click Reattempt option You can take action by clicking on the reattempt option You can also check the action history by clicking on view history. While taking action on RTO NDR, you can change phone number and address. (Only applicable for Delhivery, Ecom express and Xpressbees) You can also select the reattempt date and upload call recordings of your and FE conversation. Important Points- You can take action for reattempt within 10 days from the date of RTO NDR. If the action is not taken within 10 days then the shipment will be disposed off. You can take action for reattempt only once. If the second delivery attempt fails, then the shipment will be disposed off. The RTO rejected tab shows all the rejected RTO shipments by you. You can check the list of disposed off shipment by applying status filter. About email notification: You will get three notifications, When an RTO NDR is raised, an email notification will be sent to you, in 4 hours of span, including the AWBs till that time. W e will mention in the email that you have only 10 days left to take action against these orders . Further, you will receive the same notification on 5th day & 9th day to take action for your RTO-NDR shipment. Further assistance:- Is there service related anything else I can help you with ? Closing- Thank you for calling in Shiprocket, have a nice day. Back India Post Secure Policy Shiprocket is now working with India post to provide better serviceability and services. India Post is now live for all pin-codes created by India Post. Currently India Post is providing two modes of shipping:- Speed Post (Air mode) - Upto 2Kg (maximum weight will be 2kg) Business Parcel (Surface mode) - Above 2kg, maximum weight limit not defined (minimum shipment weight will be 2kg) India Post Information Deck Serviceability – o India post covers 19k+ pincodes across the country o India post doesn’t disable pincodes like other courier partners RTO Charges – o India post doesn’t apply RTO charges against shipments Claim Liability India post Claim liability for non-secured shipments is as follows - o Speed Post - Double the Speed Post charges or INR 1000 whichever is less o Business Parcel - Rs 500 or the actual value of the parcel or the content lost, whichever is less Shipment Lifecycle o 60 days from the date of Pickup o 80% Shipments get closed within 60 days and 95% Shipments get closed within 90 days. o If shipments are not closed within 90 days of Pick up, Can be declared as lost and claim will be settled as per standard liability clause NDR SOPs o NDR workflow doesn’t exist for India post currently. Dispute Handling o Any dispute should be raised with Shiprocket within 2 days of event occurrence. o Dispute closure timeline is 60 days from the date of escalation OTP Delivery/OTP refusal o This functionality is currently not available with India Post RTO NDR Shipments o If shipments are refused by sellers during RTO delivery, Shipments will be disposed off Status update o India post shipments status get updated using FTP files and there could be some lag in updating status of few shipments SLA Commitments o Following are the TATs shared by India post § Speed Post - Zone A – 2 days, Zone B – 4 days, Zone C – 3 days, Zone D – 5 days, Zone E – 5 days (TAT is given excluding Sundays and National Holidays) § Business Parcel – Zone A – 3 days, Zone B – 6 days, Zone C – 5 days, Zone D- 7 days, Zone E – 7 days (TAT is given excluding Sundays and National Holidays) Pick up o Pick up schedule cut off time for arranging same day pick up is 10:00 hrs o In some cases, the status of the shipment as picked gets updated in 24-48 hours Benefits:- Reachable to 19k+ pin-codes. No need to be in a queue - Now you do not need to be in lines to drop your shipment for shipping, as doorstep services will be available. No RTO with ODA reason - As India post is providing services in more than 19 thousand pin-codes so no shipment will be RTO . Comparatively cheaper rates will be provided. Volume doesn't matter ( there is no limit of shipment / parcel count). No RTO charges will be applicable With India Post "COD" option is available with the "Cash" payment mode only Activation:- You will not be able to activate India Post from seller panel as the activation will be done from team end only. Product Update - Milestone Program Product Update - Milestone Program (1ST Dec'25) The Milestone Program is now live , an initiative designed to strengthen early seller activation and improve retention in the first few shipments. This program gives new sellers rewards on their 2nd, 3rd and 4th shipment, helping them build early momentum on the platform. Here’s how the journey works: 1st successful shipment → unlocks “Welcome20” Usable on the 2nd shipment 2nd successful shipment → unlocks “Delight20” Usable on the 3rd shipment 3rd successful shipment → unlocks “Ship20” Usable on the 4th shipment After the 4th shipment, the program ends Each coupon gives 20% off on the shipping cost, capped at ₹100 , on the next shipment. A key detail: Coupons are not auto-applied . Sellers must manually apply them during checkout. If a seller chooses not to apply a coupon on the eligible shipment, it expires and does not roll over - though they’ll still be able to use any future coupons they unlock. This is program is only available on web right now, we'll be rolling it out on our app soon. To make the journey clear and actionable, sellers will see timely nudges across the panel, WhatsApp, SMS, and Email as they hit each milestone. Why it matters: Early shipment behavior is one of the strongest predictors of long-term seller success. This program creates structured touch points that keep new sellers engaged during the most critical phase of their lifecycle. FAQ'S 1. From where the seller can unlock the option to activate the milestone feature on the Website ? Ans = There is no activation step required. The Milestone Program is automatically enabled for every new seller as soon as they complete their first awb assignment. They don’t have to turn anything on manually. They have to manually apply the coupons though on the courier selection page. 2. Is it a chargeable service ? Ans= No, the program is completely free for sellers. 3. What will be the SPOC & TAT if the seller will not receive the discount after the activation of the milestone feature ? Ans = Since the coupons are issued automatically, missing-coupon scenarios should be rare. If it happens, the seller can raise a ticket via the standard support flow. Usual TAT and SPOC applies (same as other coupon/discount-related queries). 4. Will sellers get any notification about the new feature of the milestone on the website or will the advisor will share the update to the new sellers ? Ans = Sellers will receive automatic notifications/nudges through: • WhatsApp • SMS • Email • Seller Panel Advisors do not need to manually update sellers unless a specific query comes in. 5. Festive season surcharge (FAQ) Shiprocket Festive Surcharge – Internal FAQ (CX Team Version) Q1. What is the Festive Surcharge? A: The Festive Surcharge is a temporary, seasonal fee during the festive period. It ensures Shiprocket’s platform and courier partners are fully equipped to manage high shipment volumes without disruption. Q2. Why is Shiprocket introducing this surcharge? A: During festive season, shipment volumes surge across India. To keep your business running smoothly, Shiprocket invests in technology, system scaling, and partner support, while courier partners expand their delivery capacity. The surcharge makes this possible. Q3. Is this permanent? A: No. It is strictly temporary and will apply only from 12 th Sep’25 to 12 th Dec’25. Q4. Who will be charged the Festive Surcharge? A: It applies to all shipments booked on the Shiprocket platform during the festive period. This will vary depending on Plan. Q5. How much is the surcharge? A: The surcharge will be applicable per shipment based on plans, below are the details(exclusive GST): Lite - ₹3 per shipment Basic to Diamond - ₹2 shipment Q6. Does it apply to both COD and prepaid shipments? A: Yes, it applies to all shipments. Q7. Is it courier-specific or platform-wide? A: It is a platform-level surcharge, not courier-specific. Q8. How does this benefit sellers? A: The surcharge ensures: · Stable deliveries even at peak festive demand · Faster processing & allocation through Shiprocket’s upgraded systems · Better delivery predictability thanks to courier partners scaling capacity · Stronger customer experience → fewer delays, better satisfaction Q9. What happens if it’s not collected? A: Without it, festive demand could strain delivery networks, causing delays and service disruptions. The surcharge ensures business continuity. Q10. Can sellers opt out? A: No. It’s a standard platform-wide policy during the festive season. Q11. Will it be refunded later? A: No. The surcharge covers real-time investments and partner capacity support during the festive period. Q12. Other platforms don’t charge this — why Shiprocket? A: Many logistics players do charge peak surcharges. Shiprocket keeps it minimal and transparent while ensuring sellers enjoy the benefit of a reliable ecosystem. Q13. Will this happen every year? A: Shiprocket reviews this based on demand. It is introduced only when required to ensure stability of the sellers.

Drone Delivery FAQ 1. What is a drone delivery service? A drone delivery service is a type of logistics and transportation service that uses unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), commonly known as drones, to deliver goods and packages to customers. These services are typically operated by companies, and they offer a novel and more efficient way of delivering items to customers' doorsteps or designated delivery locations. FAQ 2. How It is beneficial for me as a Seller ? Via drone delivery service you will be able to achieve faster & same day delivery Moreover, your buyers will have a WOW Experience. FAQ 3. Is this applicable to all the tiers/plan users? This is for NAM Bronze and above tiers FAQ 4. How to activate the drone delivery service? Request needs to be share with Manohar & team for activation. FAQ 5. What will be the freight charges? Minimum charges is 90Rs of .5kg, rest new charges will be released soon. FAQ 6. Who will be the SPOC for pickup & delivery-related issue? For queries and issues :-SPOC are :- manohar.paraliya@shiprocket.com, dinesh.kumar1@shiprocket.com,gupta.prateek@shiperocket.com FAQ 7. List /names of serviceable PIN codes. FM activated Pincodes:122003,122001- depends ADL, we will forward the request to the team ,no commitments Fully available for GGN warehouses pincodes- 122506, 122503 LM Activated Pincodes: 122012 122001 122017 122006 122005 122011 122003 122002 122022 122009 122018 122004 FAQ 8. Is the service available for COD shipments as well? If yes, then what will be the remittance process? COD is not live currently soon we will have this MOP, FAQ 9. Minimum and maximum weight limit. (if any) Max weight is 2kg that can be shipped FAQ 10. What will be the Cut-off time for pickup and estimated delivery date and time ? Cut off time is 8am-9am and pickup will be done between 9am to 11am.Delivery attempt will be made for same day between 2pm to 7pm . Attempts and NDR process will remain same as per the current SOP. OTP based delivery is not available right now. Future pickup option is not available FAQ 11. Is this applicable on Desktop and mobile apps both? Its available on desktop and App both FAQ 12. Types of goods that can be shipped or prohibited. Goods tagged under “dangerous good” are prohibited. FAQ 13. Is there any Shipment value limit ? Shipment value should be less than Rs. 10,000 FAQ 14. Available courier names for drone delivery Currently we are shipping thru “SKYEAIR” Courier and have done 1200+ shipments FAQ 15. How an agent can check the type of shipment (drone or normal ) on ICRM? There is no separate tag for shipments going through this medium however with the same assigned courier nae same can be identified. FAQ 16. tracking update is visible or not ? Yes,tracking is available FAQ 17. What will be the process for delivery disputes (wrong/Damaged/partial) Dispute will be managed as per shiprocket SOP

Order Verification Order verification is a shipment setting that allows you to verify COD and Prepaid orders before shipping them. You should enable it for your account if; - You want to have better control over your RTOs - You are using Shiprocket Fulfillment and want to verify your orders before moving them to the warehouse. Note: This setting is available for all Shiprocket plans. Key Features: This feature help for order verification for both COD and Prepaid orders. You will be directly able to connect with buyers for order verification via option available on your seller panel before order shipping. After choosing calling option an manual call will be placed to buyer within business hours for the order verification before Order shipping. Order verification before shipping would help to reduce RTO chances from buyer end. How to enable Order Verification setting? 1. Log in to your Shiprocket account and go to Settings -> Additional Settings-> Shipment Features. 2. Under Shipment Features, you'll find the "Order Verification" button. 3. Now, simply turn the toggle on to enable COD and Prepaid Order verification. Here's how you can verify your orders: 1) From the left menu, select Orders. This will bring you to the New tab, where you can view all of your pending/new orders. 3. Now, simply turn the toggle on to enable COD and Prepaid Order verification. Here's how you can verify your orders: 1) From the left menu, select Orders. This will bring you to the New tab, where you can view all of your pending/new orders. 2) For Single Order: a) Go to the more (...) icon, which is located right next to the Ship Now button, and click on it. b) Click on the Mark as Verified button to verify your order for shipping. c) Once verified, a Verified tag will be applied to your order. This will help you identify all verified orders that are eligible for shipping. 3) For Bulk Orders: a) Select all orders that you would like to verify. Next, click on the Bulk Actions button. b) Click on Verify Orders button to verify all selected orders. c) Once verified, a Verified tag will be applied to your order. This will help you identify all verified orders that are eligible for shipping. Place a call from the panel: Step 1: Go to orders option and select particular order, then click on call buyer option. Step 2: Enter the buyer contact detail for verification and click on initiate call to buyer.

Non Pickup Response Response (NPR) Scenario 1:- Seller called to know the NPR. Opening:- Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to Shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? Assurance:- I will surely help you regarding NPR feature. Information :- Sir/Ma'am , I would like to inform you that NPR is a feature that helps you to take action via What's app /IVR/SMS/Email once the pickup of your shipment gets failed due to any reason. You will be having 3 options in NPR once the shipment pickup gets failed :- Re-attempt Escalation (with escalation reason) Cancel Pickup Attempt (Order will not get cancelled) Proactive Information :- At the moment NPR is raised by courier you will be notified at the same time via What's app and Email. If no response is received via What's app or Email then you will receive an IVR call post 60 minutes. If no response is received on the IVR Call, What's app reminder will be sent 30 min post IVR call. If no response is received on What's app reminder, 2nd IVR Call will be triggered post 60 min of What's app reminder. If no response is received on the 2nd IVR call, data will be sent to the call center after 30 min. ( Not activated -In progress) Further Assistance:- Is there anything else, I can assist regarding shiprocket. Closing :- Thank you for calling in shiprocket have a nice day.

Transfer Protocol L1 to L2 call transfer work flow Important Note - All Social threat, Management or Consumer forum will be live transfer if L2 is not available then TL/ Mentor/QA/ Trainer will take the call. If Seller is asking for next level at L2 end then TL/ QA/ Trainer need to do the callback - No denial will be given to seller. ( Direct transfer is not possible on manger level ) Case 1 L1 advisor gets the call from seller and will gather all the required details like: AWB number’s, previous ticket ID’s, Last resolution provided. If the case is new and no ticket is created previously, the advisor will create a ticket with all details filled. Before the transfer advisor will inform the seller that he/she will check the senior availability and ask for the permission for hold and will share the hold time, and mark RED SOS in the ticket. Discuss the case with L2 and provide the case details like AWB number, Ticket Number, VOC, total hold time and then Transfer the call to L2 Case 2 L2 advisor not available (Not applicable for Management, Consumer forum and Social threat) L1 advisor will refresh the hold and apologies for the long hold and inform the seller that all the seniors are busy now. I can arrange a call back from the seniors ( TAT- 30 Minutes.) Advisor will fill the call back tracker and will update the same in ticket notes and close the call and mark RED SOS in the ticket. Scripts :- L2 advisor opening script: (Internal) Good morning/Afternoon/ Evening your call has been transferred to supervisor desk My name is (share name) how can I help you. L1 advisor will greet the L2 agent (Internal) Good morning/Afternoon/ Evening, my name is Anuj and I have Mr. (seller name) with me and he/she is facing issue (as per query/ complaint) This is the AWB number (share AWB) as I have checked the shipment is RTO without NDR and there is a ticket created (share ticket ID) and the team has given an update on (share date), I have informed him about the resolution that was shared by the team, but he/she(seller) wants to speak to senior. L2 advisor will check the details and will take over the call. While taking transfer call, L2/TL/ Mentors need to follow the below mentioned script :-(While interacting with seller) Thanks for being on hold, your call has been transferred to senior supervisor, really Apology for the time taken in transfer. The fee amount varies based on the selected payment method. The convenience fee is automatically added to the seller’s payable amount at Razorpay checkout after they choose a payment method. Initially , the corresponding entries for convenience fees were not reflected in the Passbook . From 14th August 2025 onwards, convenience fee entries have been automated and are now visible in the Passbook. 4. We also observed that some transactions were using UPI with RuPay Credit Cards. So, we have implemented an additional check for this scenario, which went live on 28th August 2025 . Shiprocket Secure Secure Policy Scenario :- Seller called to know about Shiprocket secure. Opening:- Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to Shiprocket. My Name is ___. How may I help you? Assurance:- I will surely assist you regarding your concern. Information- There are two ways through which you can opt for SR secure- Selective Secure: You can secure your individual shipments, which values above Rs. 50 00 and below Rs. 4,76,190 . How to opt- 1. While creating the order manually- In order details you will get an option to choose secure shipment. You can select "yes" if you want to secure your shipment. 2. Based on your selection, the freight cost will increase and the shipment will get secured. 3. You can also do the same on bulk shipments as well. If you select multiple shipments and click Ship, then you are prompted with the same secured and unsecured selection and based on your requirement all shipments between Rs. 500 0 and Rs. 4,76,190 are secured. Blanket Secure: You can also choose to cover all your shipments in the 500 0 - 4,76,190 bracket. After enabling this option, all the shipments above Rs 5000 and below Rs 4,76,190 will be secured automatically. Path- Seller panel>>Settings>>Shipment features>>Secure shipment Once enabled, You will not be shown the secured-unsecured toggle and will automatically get all your shipments secured. The claim amount will be credited to the bank account if the shipment value is more than 5000 The claim amount will be credited to the wallet if the shipment value is upto 5000 Note : Secure facility is not available in return shipments. For shipments valued between Rs 5 000 marked as lost and secured, the full amount will be automatically processed into the seller's wallet within 5 to 7 business days. Please be aware that such cases can be identified by the "Sr Secured" tag in ICRM, specifically under the shipping charges option. In the event that a shipment exceeds a value of 5K and is secured, it will undergo the final claim settlement process with our insurer. Such cases can be identified by 'Symbo'. Their TAT for resolution in such cases is estimated at 15 to 20 working days. Going forward, for all Secure cases where the claim refund timeline has been breached , the following actions will be taken by the CS & CC teams : Scenario 1: Claim Amount < ₹5,000 A ticket will be raised to the FOPS team . FOPS will internally cross-check the details and respond to the seller with the updated refund timeline or request any additional requirements from the seller. Scenario 2: Claim Amount > ₹5,000 A ticket will be raised to Vipin in Secure (advisor to select channel “SR Secure”). Vipin will cross-check the details and update the ticket with internal notes. Vipin will also update the tracker. The CC team will then: Outbound call the seller to inform them of the updated refund timeline or any additional requirements . Update the ticket with internal notes. Update the tracker accordingly. This process is being implemented to ensure timely communication with sellers and improved tracking of refund cases. FAQs of Shipment Secure (Only if seller asks) Question- What is the Percentage of the amount deducted for insurance? Answer- Insurance Amount: Convenience Fee + Policy premium(For B2C) ⦁ We updated the pricing for insurance premium. The revised insurance premium is 0.79% of the base shipment value. ⦁ Convenience Fee (Including GST): 0.32% of the Net total (105% of shipment value) ⦁ Policy premium: 0.15% of the Net total (105% of shipment value) + 18% GST Question-Will insurance cover the RTO and return shipment as well? Answer- Secure service is available in RTO but not available in return shipments Question-Will there be any changes in shipment damage policies? Answer-Depends on the insurance company Question-Will GST be mandatory or not to avail the insurance? Answer-GST for the customer is not mandatory Question-Who can avail insurance? Is it based on plan/Tier? Answer- Everyone Question-How can we check if the amount has been charged for insurance for a particular shipment? Answer-In ICRM>shipping details>shipping charges; one can view whether a specific AWB is insured or not and Insurance amount and its bifurcation. Question-Will I get the freight refund benefit or only the insured value in case of damage/lost shipment? Answer-Yes, you will get the freight refund in both lost and damage cases ( provided it has been confirmed by the courier). In case of lost, will get the entire invoice value.The reimbursement for damage shipment is subjective. Question-The insurance amount will be credited in the bank account or SR wallet? Answer- For shipments valued between Rs 500 0 marked as lost and secured, the full amount will be automatically processed into the seller's wallet within 3 to 4 business days. Rest for the shipment above 5K amount will be processed in Bank account. Question- If the shipment is damaged in transit will I be eligible for the insured amount. Answer- Yes, if it meets the terms and conditions. Question- What will be the scenario if I take insurance on perishable/banned/restricted goods? Answer- If the item insured through SR platform is not covered in the insurance policy then no claims can be given. Question-In case the customer snatches the product, will I be eligible for the insurance or not? Answer-Sorry, but you will not be eligible for claim in case of snatching Question- Will I get tax benefits from the insurance? Answer- No. Question-What will be the TAT of insurance claim to credit? Answer- For shipments valued between Rs 500 0 marked as lost and secured, the full amount will be automatically processed into the seller's wallet within5-7 business days . In the event that a shipment exceeds a value of 5K and is secured, it will undergo the final claim settlement process with our insurer. Such cases can be identified by 'Symbo'. Their TAT for resolution in such cases is estimated at 15 to 20 working days . Questions-On label, will it be mentioned that the shipment is Secured/unsecured? Answer-No Question-F rom which email id I will receive Insurance related email ? Answer-sr.insuranceclaims@shiprocket.com Question-Is the insurance policy available on SR website? Answer-The terms and condition for the insurance policy are available. Question-Will there be any changes in the damage policy if I get my shipment damaged due to poor packaging/ inner shipment damage but outer packaging intact. Answer- No, If the courier says the damage has been done due to poor packaging, then its claim will be rejected. Question-What all documents are required for the insurance claim ? Answer- Agent will inform the seller that its courier based. Question-Incase seller approaches first in the insurance case, then what needs to be done Answer-Assign the ticket to Finance Desk only when damage/lost has been confirmed by the courier. Team will connect with seller in 2 working days. Opening : Good Morning /Afternoon/ Evening Welcome to Shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? System Check :- 1) Copy link from SPARK & paste it in new tab / check registered no. Eway Bill Generation:- Eway Bill will be generated from GST website ( for shipment values more than Rs. 50,000 ) with the help of Transporter ID of assigned courier partner. Inform seller about :- You can upload an Eway Bill after assigning courier for your orders. You can now upload the Eway Bill at the time of pickup generation : Generate Pickup Popup At the time of pickup generation, we will ask you to upload an Eway bill for your order. Here are the details you need to upload the Eway Bill: Eway Bill number Eway Bill (PDF format) Eway Bill invoice Next, click on the 'Eway Bill' button to proceed. You can then go ahead and generate a pickup for your order. Ready to Ship Screen Search for your order and scroll towards your right to find the 'Upload Eway Bill' button. Click on it to add the required details to upload your Eway Bill. Once done, you can generate a pickup for your order. Order Details Screen Click on the order ID to see complete details of your order. Here you’ll find an 'Upload Eway bill' button at the top half of your screen. Click on it to upload your E way bill and generate your order pickup. With this, we have also added the functionality of uploading Eway Bill for your RTO shipments : Uploading an Eway Bill for your RTO shipment is mandatory if the order value is more than Rs. 50000. Steps to be followed: Go to 'Shipments' from your left-menu and select RTO. Check shipping details of your RTO order to find the 'Upload Eway Bill' button. Click on it to upload a new Eway bill for your shipment. E-way Bill Validity is 7 days If you want to update existing Eway Bill : Here are the following steps to update your already uploaded Eway Bill: Click on the order ID to see complete details of your order. Click on the 'Eway Bill' button to update your details. A pop up will open where you need to update your Eway Bill details. Once finalized, click on Upload Eway Bill button to proceed. Further assistance :- Is there service related anything else I can help you with ? Closing :- Thank you for calling Shiprocket. Have a nice day. SR Assured (Verified Seller) Q1.What needs to be done if a non-SR Assured buyer connects to SR Assured support helpline? Ans- The agent will inform the buyer that since this seller is not an SR-Assured seller the buyer should contact the seller customer care Q2. For an approved refund in case of DNR/wrong/defective or damaged product will SR provide the refund to the buyer and send a debit note to the Seller or SR will wait for the Seller to provide a refund? Ans – SR will issue the refund and send a debit note to the Seller- Q3. 14 days TAT will be for all the cases? Ans- Yes. If the case isn’t solved within 14 days, for the purpose of the pilot, Shiprocket will make exceptions and underwrite the products. This will be done once for a buyer-seller combination. a) How can the agent check the repeat incident of dispute created by the same buyer for the same seller (Same Seller – buyer combination) ? A repeat incident only occurs if it’s for the same AWB. A buyer-seller pair may have multiple incidents. b) If repeat incident is identified, what will be the denial communication that needs to be provided to the buyer? For a repeat on the same AWB, agent to inform the buyer that the issue has either been resolved, or is under resolution, or has breached the 3-calendar day mark for raising disputes. Q4. What will be the callback TAT that CS agents will provide to the buyer on call/email from (KAM)? Ans- Standard call-back TAT (48 hours) Q5. What will be the resolution TAT that CS agents will provide to the buyer on call/email from (KAM)? Ans- Maximum of 14 days after they raise the issue Q6. What needs to be done if a buyer approaches after 3 days of product delivery Ans- If a buyer approaches after 3 calendar days from the delivery date, the agent to inform the buyer that the date has been breached. However, for the purpose of the pilot, the agent to inform relevant KAM about such instances. Q7. If the buyer sends an email to support id then what will be actionable for the CS agent? Ans- The Agent will assign the ticket to the respective dispute-handling team (as is the usual process) and keep the KAM in the loop so he/she is aware. KAM will not contact the buyer and will only talk to the seller for a quick resolution.- Answer under the actionable by CS agent Q8. Once issue is resolved how communication will be sent to the buyer? KAM will provide the final resolution to the buyer through the regular nugget process. Actionable by CS agent :- actions to be taken by CS agent over the call & email Dispute identification over call or on Email · Agent will require an AWB number from the buyer to identify the dispute in the ICRM Actions initiated by agents for the dispute · The agent will initiate the action for the AWB on the ICRM (DNR cases) Panel for the buyers. · The agent will create the nugget ticket with the contact details of the buyer (email & number) and the ticket will be assigned to the respective KAM. · KAMs to further liaison up with the sellers to upload the required documents/ evidence for the dispute on the panel within the TAT for resolution. Action on nugget · The Agent will mention AWB number & Company ID on the subject line. · The Agent will mention about the actions taken on the ticket mail body ( for KAM reference). · All nugget tickets to be tagged as VF_BYR so that the KAMs can identify the tickets for verified buyers. Additional actions · Along with the above actions the agent will send the first response to the buyer to inform them about the actions initiated on their behalf and communicate 14days TAT for resolution. · Post resolution/ completion of the TAT, respective KAM will share the information with the buyers over Email through nugget . Instant COD What is Instant COD? With Instant COD, sellers will now receive their cash on delivery (COD) remittance the next day after shipping their orders. This means that sellers will have the ability to access a portion of their COD amount as soon as the next day after shipping their orders, significantly improving their liquidity. The service is designed to provide instant remittance options that enable sellers to reinvest in their businesses more effectively and promptly. Components of Shiprocket Instant COD: Instant COD (Initial Remittance): Upto 70% of the total COD amount will be remitted on S+1 (one day after shipment is shipped). The initial Remittance percentage may vary in every COD remittance cycle based on the seller's performance. Remaining Remittance: The remaining COD amount will be remitted to the seller as per their ongoing COD remittance cycle upon confirmation of the shipment’s final status. A service fee of 2.99% will apply to the COD amount remitted through Instant COD. The commission on the remaining COD balance will be as per their ongoing COD remittance cycle Plan. Let's understand this better with the help of an example:- For instance, if a seller's current COD remittance plan is Early COD(D+2) and the COD amount of his shipment shipped on 23rd September is ₹1,00,000 , he could receive up to ₹67,907 (up to 70% of the total COD amount after deducting a 2.99% fee of Instant COD) as Instant COD on 24th September (the day after shipping) . The remaining ₹29,703 (pending 30% of the total COD amount after deducting a 0.99% fee of Early COD) will be remitted 2 days after delivery. If the seller is not an Early COD user and is on the Standard plan, the remaining ₹30,000 (pending 30% of the total COD amount) will follow the standard D+8 process and will not attract any charges. How is Instant COD Different from Early COD (D+2, D+3, D+4) Plans? Instant COD will act as a wrapper for Early COD which means if a seller already uses Early COD plan for faster COD remittance, they can still opt for Instant COD. If sellers decide to disable Instant COD, their Early COD plan will remain active, and they will continue to receive remittances according to that plan. Instant COD: Sellers receive up to 70% of their COD amount the day after their orders get shipped. The remaining amount is processed according to their current COD remittance plan (ECOD/Standard Remittance plan). Early COD (D+2, D+3, D+4 Plans): Under these remittance plans, the entire COD amount is transferred 2, 3, or 4 days after the delivery date, depending on the specific plan selected. How can Instant COD be enabled from the Seller panel? - For the phase 1 launch of "Instant COD" selected sellers will go through direct activation of the service from the Shiprocket seller panel. A new option of "Instant COD" is added in the Seller Remittance of the Settings of the Seller panel. - Upon clicking on the "Instant COD" option in the Seller Remittance, the seller will land on the landing page of "Instant COD". - To enable Instant COD, sellers can Navigate to Settings → Seller Remittance → Instant COD → Click on "Enable Instant COD" cta. Upon accepting T&C and clicking ‘‘Enable Instant COD’, the seller will receive a 6-digit OTP on their registered email address (of the primary user). Additionally, the seller will receive a confirmation email from Shiprocket acknowledging successful registration for Instant COD services keeping their respective KAM in cc. Once registered, all remittances of COD amounts will be processed on an instant COD remittance basis starting from that day. When and for whom is it going Live? This has gone live today for 150 sellers (Gold - 118 and Platinum - 32) in phase-1 and we will open this for all Shiprocket sellers gradually in the next few weeks. These 150 sellers will be able to see the Instant COD components in the seller panel and would be able to enable it from their respective Shiprocket panels. Shopify Sync Issue FAQ 1: My Shopify Channel on SR App is showing an "Authentication failed" error. Resolution: Inform Seller - "Sir/Ma'am, due to a technical glitch, the Shopify channel is encountering an authentication failed error. But don't worry, you simply need to proceed with re-authentication from your seller panel. Please follow these steps: Go to Setup & Manage > Channels. Select the Shopify channel. Click on the "Re-authenticate" option. This should resolve your issue. FAQ 2: I have received a message to re-authenticate my Shopify channel, why? Resolution: Inform Seller - "Sir/Ma'am, you have received this notification from our end because the Shopify channel is encountering an authentication failed error due to a technical glitch. To resolve this, you simply need to proceed with re-authentication from your seller panel. Please follow these steps: Go to Setup & Manage > Channels. Select the Shopify channel. Click on the "Re-authenticate" option. Message sent to seller: "Hi Shiprocket sellers, We encountered a glitch while re-syncing your Shopify connections, affecting our ability to update courier status on Shopify for Shiprocket orders. Your Shopify order creation on Shiprocket remains unaffected. To fix this: Go to Setup & Manage > Channels. Select your Shopify channel with 'Authentication failed'. Click 'Re-Authenticate'. Log in into shopify if prompted. You're all set!" Change Company Name SOP – Company Name Change Handling Effective from 8th November'25 Company name changes are generally not allowed because the company name is linked with KYC compliance. The L1 advisor will deny the request by providing a soft denial explanation, stating that the company name cannot be changed, and then create a (FCR in the Customer Support Call Center channel. If the seller still disagrees, as an exception: Request the seller to provide: The reason for the name change request, The updated company name , The GST document (3 pages) . The advisor should create an Awaiting Customer Response (ACR) requesting these GST details from the seller. Assign the ticket to the "Compliance Queries" channel with the advisor name set to "Ravi Jangra" . Upon receiving the required details over the call/Chat/Email(reason, updated company name, and 3 pages of GST), change the ticket status to "Open" in the "Compliance Queries" channel for further processing.

Back Pickup (Connection-Dispute) Connection Dispute If the field executive has picked up the shipment but the status is not updated on the panel—and the latest status is pickup exception, pickup scheduled, pending, cancelled, invoiced, ready to ship, or new—while the seller confirms pickup, treat this as a connection dispute and follow the resolution steps. If Seller calls on the same day of pickup but status not live so Advise seller to wait till end of day (EOD). In case shipment status not updated till next day :- Request the seller to share the below-mentioned details , within 48–72 hours (on receipt of email): Date of pickup Total shipments picked up that date All signed manifest copies for courier (if multiple manifests, for the same day) FE (Field Executive) phone number Inform the seller: After details are shared, the team will update in 7 working days. Advisor must send ACR mail from Nugget to the seller " Use Template : Pickup connection issue" Tagging SR Issue Category : Shipment Pickup Sub Category : Pickup Miscellaneous AWB Number : As per ICRM FCR : NFCR

Back How to create Return? Opening : Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? System Check :- 1) Copy link from SPARK & paste it in new tab / Click on Internal ICRM > Click on seller info Inform seller about following :- I would like to inform you that return order option available in all the plans. There are two main ways through which you can create return or ders : From ‘Delivered’ order Manual Return order 1. From Delivered Orders Please follow the steps below to create a reverse order from ‘delivered’ orders: Go to the ‘Orders’ tab in the left menu Now, click on 'All Orders For all shipments that have been marked as ‘Delivered’, you will automatically find a ‘Create Return’ option. Click on ‘Returns’ A new page with prefilled details about your order will open By default, your buyer’s address will become the pick-up address. By default, your pick up address will become the destination You can change your drop address or add a new address if you have multiple saved addresses 2.) Manual Reverse orders You can create a manual return order by following the steps below: a) Go to the ‘Returns’ tab in the left panel b) Now, click on 'Add Return'. c) You will be redirected to a new page where you will have to fill in details like: Pickup POC Details Add your buyer's address and contact details here. Make sure you enter the right phone number and email address, as we use the same for all further communication. Next, add your buyer's complete address with a landmark, if possible Pickup Proactive Before 1pm will be picked up same day and rest after 1pm creation will be picked next day. below are available courier Shadowfax Reverse Delhivery Reverse Xpressbess reverse-" <undefined> Order Details Please provide the return order ID or click on Generate. Mention the date on which return order created, and return order channel name Product Details Mandatory section -SKU ,quantity & price. However, we recommend you provide other product details as well that include the brand name, color, HSN, discount details, etc Return Reason Go ahead and select the reason for the return that your buyer has shared with you. You can also upload pictures of your product along with a comment if there's any. Delivery Address Add your warehouse/office/storehouse address here, where you would like to receive the delivery of your return order Weight and dimensions We would suggest you take help from your return product's weight & dimensions to fill this information Payment Details By default, we are considering prepaid in payment details as it's a return order Finally, go ahead and create your return order Once the return order is created it will be displayed in the ‘returns’ tab. You can click on the ‘Initiate Return’ tab to ship your return order. Tech-Related FAQs:- Why real time order is not synching from channel? There are 3 reason for order not sync 1. If Channel is Amazon only self-ship order will be synced. 2. If Channel is Shopify, only unfulfilled / Unshipped status orders will be synced else not. 3. Other Channels, ask the client to check the status of order sync, channel activation status and Shiprocket account should not be Suspended or Terminated. 4. Check the channel is connected on the seller panel or not if channel is not connected ask seller to reauthenticate (reauthentication button is available for Shopify and Amazon as of now). 5.For Shopify channel channel check the status to fetch as unfulfilled, unshipped is mentioned or not. Also check Pull Prepaid orders with Tags and Pull COD orders with Tags. if these are mentioned in the channel setting page all orders will not get synced only the orders with this will get synced. Therefore if seller want all the orders to get synced ask seller to remove this tag from the channel page. 6. For woocommerec-Legancy API Should be Enabled Rest API - Read/write access should be given. 7. We do not provide any API key for any of the market place channel. When seller try to connect any market place channel it get auto generated from the seller market place channel. 8. Read write access should be provided for every API for every channel and seller can only provide the same. 9. For Shopify email address on Shopify and shiprocket should be same otherwise if shiprocket app install on the Shopify and seller try to access Shiprocket account, new shiprocket account will be created with the same email address mentioned on the Shopify. 10. We sync order only of last 24 hrs from all channel and if channel is diconnected and order is not synced ask seller to reauthenticate and connect the channel. once the channel is connected orders will start getting sync but only of last 24 hrs. Therefore if seller wants older orders to get sync please ask seller to share the date from which they want their orders to sync and raise it to tech team so that tech team can forcefully sync the back dated order. 2. Why real time freight info not availble for all channel except API and Woocommerce Client has to intergrate the channel or API with shiprocket panel, then shipping charges and courier servicevilibity will visible in the website. for this activation we have internal api for Woocommerce only and for ther client can use the external api. Doc link for external api: https://apiv2.shiprocket.in/v1/external/courier/serviceability/ Woocommerce: https://support.shiprocket.in/support/solutions/articles/43000326199-how-do-i-integrate-woocommerce-with-shiprocket- 2. If buyer does change in order on seller's website so same would be update in SR panel or not. Once the order get synced, if any changes happens with order details on website, same changes will not be reflect in the on SR Panel, client can do the changes manually if the status of order is new only. We auto sync the details only from the Shopify if the order the order status is new 4. Seller wanted own tracking page in his website Client can get this activate via POST Ship, Path: SR Panel-->Setting-->Tracking-->Page Settings or use our tracking API to display tracking on their website, however they want. 5. After following all step for Integration still facing Invalid credential related Issue Ask seller shiprocket credentails and market place credentials so that Tech team can check further 8. If seller already enable MPS in SR-panel so seller can process Channel' Order for same or not ? MPS order can be create manually there is no API as of now 9. Pincode serviceablity issue on Woocommerce There are multple reasons to face this issue: 1. Client need to complete the app configuration in the woocommerce store or channel. 2. Client has to update the product information(weight and dimensions in kg/cm) in woocommerce channel for all the products. 3. Client have to add at least one pickup address on their shiprocket account. For real time rates on woocommerce channel client need to follow the mentioned below steps: Login to Woocommerce>>Click on plugins>>Search for "real time rate plugin and activate the same". 10. If a seller adds GST detail in his shopify or woocommerce so the same will sync in our SR-panel or not? yes, if GST is added in the order and we are receiving in the request from the seller ends we will show the same 11. Are we doing integration of Unicommerce or not ? Yes then how? Yes, via external doc, please find the doc link: https://support.shiprocket.in/a/solutions/articles/43000337456 12. seller having issue that freight related info will be visible on checkout page or not? and if the seller will do API integration for that, will it be possible or not? Possible with serviceability API 13. How to generate Token in API ? Need Examples. Following the steps mentioned in the doc link: https://support.shiprocket.in/support/solutions/articles/43000337456-shiprocket-api-document-helpsheet 14. Wix integration is possible via API Inte. ? Yes, via external doc, please find the doc link: https://support.shiprocket.in/a/solutions/articles/43000337456 15. Is buyer communication option available in upgrade Plan (Basic, advance, Pro) Buyer Communication is available with all the plans, if client wants to edit the communication then, client has to upgrade the plan to Enterprise Plan. 16. Seller is unable to recharge error shows "payment gateway error" Ask to share the error snapshot and share with Tech 17. What are reason for pickup error Ask to share the error snapshot if error status is >24hrs and share with Tech, or ask the client to refresh the order 18. Label and manifest is not being downloaded in bulk Please check the logo. If the logo size is greater than 100kb then label and manifest will take time to get download sometimes error might also comes, therefore ask seller to update his/her logo on the channel page and make it upto 30-35kb. 19. Payment mode not sync etc. Ask seller to map payment method id in the channel setting in Map Payment Statuses>Prepaid and this is applicable across all the channel. By default we sync orders as COD if map payment status is not mapped 20. API Token Expired Token is only valid for 10 days, seller needs to regenerate the token again on every 10th days 21. Require API Keys - API API key can be generated through the Authentication API with the API user email and password mentioned on the panel. API user can not be same as registered email address Below are some basic queries done by the sellers at CC, hope this might be helpful for you too- 1 . If a seller adds GST detail in his shopify or woocommerce so the same will sync in our SR-panel or not? Ans: Yes, if the seller passed the GST details via Shopify or WooCommerce in the orders we will fetch the same. 2. Are we doing integration of Unicommerce or not ? Yes then how? Ans: Yes, we are doing integration of Unicommerce via API as this is a third party and Unicommerce will help in the same. 3. seller having issue that freight related info will be visible on checkout page or not? and if the seller will do API integration for that, will it be possible or not? Ans: We do provide these features only for WooCommerce channel as of now. However sellers can use Serviceability API to implement the same at their end.Below is the API Doc URL. API doc URL: https://apidocs.shiprocket.in/#29ff5116-0917-41ba-8c82-638412604916 API URL: https://apiv2.shiprocket.in/v1/external/courier/serviceability/ 4. How to generate Token in API ? Need Examples. Ans: Seller needs to create an API user in the seller panel and using that they can create the token. Please note sellers can not use email id which is registered with Shiprocket for API users. They need to use any different email id for the API user. Sellers can use email and password in the API user in the seller panel. Curl request for the same. curl --location --request POST ' https://apiv2.shiprocket.in/v1/external/auth/login ' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "email": "", "password": "" }' 5. Wix integration is possible via API Inte. ? Ans: Yes, Shiprocket API can be used as per seller requirement. 6. Is buyer communication option available in upgrade Plan (Basic, advance, Pro) Ans: yes, Buyer communication is available. 7. How to integrate API ? Ans. Go to Settings -> API -> Configure -> Create an API user ->Enter mail ID and password . 8. How to do channel integration ? Ans. Go to channels -> All channels-> Add new channel -> Then select desired channel .

Refund Process Please find the updates in the refund policy. Please provide download to the entire floor immediately. When to Give Refunds Refunds should only be given if any of these apply: Only if the seller is very upset, frustrated,distress in voice,disputing why should I pay in any way of communication If the seller asks for a refund right away. If the seller has contacted customer support 3 times about the same issue. In case of Threat(ORM/Legal/Management, etc) Refund Matrix 1. Freight Refund: Upto Rs. 500 rs freight refund (Fwd and RTO incl) at L1 Upto Rs.1000 with L2 (not for heavy/large shipments >10kg) Cases where Freight refund can be initiated on Seller call EDD+5 days and shipment is not attempted. Without attempt RTO, whether LOPS reason is available or not. Shipment has BPR, less than 3 attempts or Zero 2. Soft Loss in case of Dispute In case of SLA breach we will refund full amount at L2 In Case of RTO SLA is 15 days, In case of forward SLA is 7 days If the seller asks why you are paying now and why earlier there was no such process then below scrip to be used: "We understand how frustrating this experience must have been. After reviewing the details shared by the courier and carefully assessing the situation, we sincerely regret the inconvenience and as a gesture of goodwill, we are processing a refund for you"

Buyer Protect We’re excited to share that Buyer Protect is now LIVE on the Shiprocket Tracking Page for buyers! Here is the link to the video : Buyer-Protect-Video About Buyer Protect - Buyer Protect acts like an insurance cover for buyers post-purchase - securing their orders against fraud, loss, or damage . With a simple one-step activation from the tracking page, buyers can instantly safeguard their purchase. Buyer Journey Activation: A hook appears on the order tracking page, allowing buyers to activate Buyer Protect. Post Activation: Once activated, buyers can raise a claim directly from the tracking page: For Damaged/Fraud Orders: After delivery For Lost Orders: 20 days post the order date A Raise Claim Form is integrated, allowing buyers to easily upload photos, videos, and order details for quick claim processing. We’ll be closely monitoring adoption and performance metrics in the coming days and will share insights post go-live.

Definition :- Split Shipment allows the sellers the ship partial shipments as per available stock. Opening : Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening Welcome to shiprocket. My Name is _. How may I help you? System Check :- 1) Copy link from SPARK & paste it in new tab Inform seller about :- I would like to inform you that by enabling split shipment in your account, you will be able to Fulfill Orders partially based on the SKU's availability in your warehouse also p rovide faster deliveries to your customers by reducing order processing time & s hip different products from different warehouses . This allows you to create 2 shipments with same Mother AWB number, and each of them will be having a Chile AWB number. Path to enable Split shipment: 1) Log in to your panel >>Settings>> Shipment Feature>> Split Shipment. 2) Turn the toggle on to activate "split shipment" for your account. Note: Split Shipment functionality only works for manual order creation. Steps to create split shipment order : Go to the "Add Order" screen and create your order manually. Once order is created the same will be visible in "Processing" tab Now, select your order from "Processing" tab and click on "Ship Now". A pop up will open where you need to select the checkbox for all the product(s) that need to be shipped. You can also update each product's quantity based on availability. Update your shipment package weight accordingly. Finally, click on the "split and ship now" button to proceed. You can then choose your preferred courier partner to ship your order. Once the pickup for partial shipment is scheduled according to courier selection then you will be redirected back to processing tab From "Processing" tab you can schedule pickup for remaining partial shipment Further assistance :- Is there service related anything else I can help you with ? Closing :- Thank you for calling Shiprocket.
